description.ko: AURA-7은 '오가닉 플로우'를 통해 기술과 자연의 매끄러운 교차점을 탐구합니다. 데이터를 살아있는 전류로 시각화하여 생물학적 시스템의 우아한 움직임을 모방하고, 반응성이 뛰어나며 조화로운 디지털 환경을 조성합니다.
description.en: AURA-7 explores the seamless intersection of technology and nature through 'Organic Flow.' It visualizes data as living currents, mimicking the graceful movement of biological systems to create a responsive and harmonious digital environment.

prompt: Cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, organic flow theme, fluid dynamic motion, iridescent liquid metal, glowing bioluminescent fibers, ethereal curves, soft macro lighting, 8k resolution, serene and futuristic atmosphere, translucent layers, smooth transitions, highly detailed textures.
